business_description.nature_of_business: Hospitality - hotels, restaurants, and corporate office operations in Texas

coverages_discussed.notes: 8 locations across Texas; TIV includes building, contents, and BI values

positives: Majority of properties are Fire Resistive or Masonry Non-Combustible construction
Modern building stock with most properties built after 1998
Stable financial position with equity of 52,535,400 and positive net income
concerns: Elevated property claim count in 2024 (11 claims)
High workers compensation claim frequency (28 claims)
Carrier has changed multiple times over the past 5 years indicating potential market instability
All locations concentrated in Texas, exposing portfolio to regional catastrophe risk (hail, windstorm)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: WC: 28 claims, 324545 paid / 415934 incurred. GL: 8 claims, 8780 paid / 82656 incurred. Property: 2 claims, 178566 paid / 215927 incurred.
